title: UK Statutory Residence Test — automatic 183-day rule
references: HMRC RDR3: Statutory Residence Test, first automatic UK test
notes: Counts days you were in the UK at the end of the day (midnight rule), grouped by UK tax year (6 April to 5 April). Midnight presence is approximated by the location of the last observation of each day. Simplifications: the deeming rule, transit-day exception, exceptional-circumstances days, and the other automatic/sufficient-ties tests of the SRT are not modeled.
